question_text: Ultrasound is used in medical scanning. Which of the following statements about ultrasound is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Ultrasound has a frequency lower than 20 Hz

options.label: B
options.text: Ultrasound has a frequency higher than 20,000 Hz

options.label: C
options.text: Ultrasound can be heard by human ears

options.label: D
options.text: Ultrasound has a lower speed than normal sound waves

explanation: Ultrasound is defined as sound with a frequency above 20,000 Hz, which is beyond the range of human hearing (typically 20 Hz to 20,000 Hz). It travels at the same speed as normal sound in a given medium.
